rulings.Case Title: MARSAE SCOTT et al VS. LENNAR CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Mtn For And Order To Compel Pltf'S Attendance At Independent Medical Exam And Req. For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, April 18, 2011, line 1, DEFENDANTS LENNAR CORPORATION, LENNAR-BVHP, LENNAR HOMES OF CALIFORNIA INC., LENNAR ASSOCIATES MANAGMENT LLC, LENNAR COMMUNITIES INC. Motion For And Order To Compel Plaintiff's Attendance At Independent Medical Exam And Request For Sanctions. MOTION FOR AN ORDER TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS' ATTENDANCE AT IME IS DENIED. THE PLAINTIFF CONFIRMED TO DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL, THROUGH HIS ATTORNEY ON MARCH 16, 2011, THAT HE WOULD ATTEND THE IME ON APRIL 22, 2011. NONETHELESS DEFENSE COUNSEL FILED THIS FRIVOLOUS MOTION ON MARCH 17, 2011. DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL TO REMIT SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 TO PLAINTIFF COUNSEL WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. HOWEVER, IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO APPEAR AT THE IME ON APRIL 22, 2011, THAT SHALL SERVE AS AN AUTOMATICE STAY OF THIS SANCTION ORDER. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: PHAT MINH THAI VS. ALIREZA BABAK CHALAKNIA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution And Bringing The Case To Trial
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, April 18, 2011, line 2, DEFENDANT ALIREZA CHALAKNIA'S Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution And Bringing The Case To Trial. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS FOR DELAY IN PROSECUTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN THAT DESPITE DILIGENT EFFORTS TO SERVE DEFENDANT, HE WAS DIFFICULT TO LOCATE DUE TO HIS USE OF ALIASES AND NUMEROUS ADDRESSES. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WAS UNABLE TO WORK FOR SOME TIME DUE TO MEDICAL ISSUES. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: JEFF GRAUMAN VS. ATLAS ELEVATOR COMPANY, A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Pltf'S Special Interrogatories, Set Two, To Deft Thyseenkrupp Elevator Corp. And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, April 18, 2011, line 7, PLAINTIFF JEFF GRAUMAN'S Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Plaintiff's Special Interrogatories, Set Two, To Defendant Thyseenkrupp Elevator Corp. And Request For Sanctions. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES GRANTED AS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES 12-13, 16-17, 21-22, 26-28, 30, 33-41. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT KNOW THE ANSWER TO A QUESTION OR DOES NOT HAVE SUFFICIENT FACTS OR RECOLLECTION TO ANSWER, IT SHOULD CLEARLY SAY SO SPECIFICALLY. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION AS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES 9-11, 18-19, 29, 32, 42-43 IS DENIED. THESE ARE COMPOUND OR WOULD REQUIRE DEFENDANT TO MAKE A COMPILATION EXPLAINING THE DOCUMENTS WHICH IS SIMPLY NOT PROPER. IF PLAINTIFF HAS SPECIFIC QUESTIONS ABOUT PARTICULAR DOCUMENTS, PLAINTIFF CAN DEPOSE THE PMK FOR DEFENDANTS. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. =(302/LMG)
